public.vw_palmares.definition:
SELECT sr.game_id, sr.champion_team_id AS team_id, COUNT(*)::int AS titles
      FROM season_records sr
      GROUP BY sr.game_id, sr.champion_team_id
public.vw_palmares.name: vw_palmares

public.vw_ranking_goleadores.definition:
SELECT a.game_id,
             a.player_id,
             COUNT(*)::int AS seasons_won,
             SUM(a.valor)::int AS total_goles
      FROM awards a
      WHERE a.tipo = 'max_goleador'
      GROUP BY a.game_id, a.player_id
public.vw_ranking_goleadores.name: vw_ranking_goleadores
